sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa, tuu sawm kua le kua om lai-a,
Tua teng tawh lungkimlo na hiam?
Kei kiang pan mangthang hilo hiam?
Amangsa ka tuu ka zong ding” ci hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A gammangsa a tuu amuh ma teng,
Gamlapi pan a ham aza ciaiciai
Cimawh-in si dinga om a mu hi,
Cimawh-in si dinga om a mu hi.
